gowin_LVDS.raw: 使用True LVDS 的Bank VCCIO 建议设置为2.5V。

VCCIO1.description: I/O Bank电源电压，与PSRAM接口相连，VCCIO1提供PSRAM工作电压

M0_VDDX/VCC_REG/VCCIO10/VCCX.description: MIPI电压M0_VDDX, Regulator电压, I/O Bank电压VCCIO10和辅助电压VCCX内部短接在一起

VCC/VCCC.description: 核电压和Clock tree电压内部短接在一起

M0_VDDA/M0_VDDD.description: MIPI电压M0_VDDA和M0_VDDD内部短接在一起

power_integrity.desc: All power and ground pins must be connected

config_pins.desc: Mandatory config pins (MODE, JTAGSEL, RECONFIG_N) must be connected

vcco_bank_consistency.desc: All IO in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCIO

diff_pair_integrity.desc: Differential pairs must be used together or not at all

unused_io.desc: Unused IO pins should not be left floating

jtag_pins.desc: JTAG pins (TCK/TMS/TDI/TDO) should be properly connected or have pull resistors

package_notes: Use the package pinout as the binding source for bonded rails such as VCC/VCCC and M0_VDDX/VCC_REG/VCCIO10/VCCX.

package_specific_notes: Use the package pinout as the binding source for bonded rails such as VCC/VCCC and M0_VDDX/VCC_REG/VCCIO10/VCCX.

package_notes: Use the package pinout as the binding source for bonded rails such as VCC/VCCC and M0_VDDX/VCC_REG/VCCIO10/VCCX.

power_domain_map.description: I/O Bank电源电压，与PSRAM接口相连，VCCIO1提供PSRAM工作电压
MIPI电压M0_VDDX, Regulator电压, I/O Bank电压VCCIO10和辅助电压VCCX内部短接在一起
核电压和Clock tree电压内部短接在一起
MIPI电压M0_VDDA和M0_VDDD内部短接在一起

pin_connection_rules.rule: Package pinout exposes SSPI_CS_N for serial configuration mode.
Package pinout exposes SSPI_WPN for serial configuration mode.
Package pinout exposes SSPI_CLK for serial configuration mode.
Package pinout marks RECONFIG_N as a required configuration connection.
Package pinout marks CCLK as a required configuration clock connection.
Package pinout marks READY as a required status output connection.
Package pinout marks MODE1 as a required configuration strap.
Package pinout exposes MISO as a serial configuration data path.
Package pinout exposes MOSI as a serial configuration data path.
Package pinout marks MODE0 as a required configuration strap.
Package pinout marks DONE as a required status output connection.
Package pinout exposes TCK for JTAG configuration/debug access.
Package pinout exposes TDI for JTAG configuration/debug access.
Package pinout exposes TMS for JTAG configuration/debug access.
Package pinout exposes TDO for JTAG configuration/debug access.
Package pinout exposes PUDC_B as a configuration strap that must not be left floating.

configuration_mode_support.notes: Derived from package pinout JTAG signal exposure.
Derived from package pinout configuration/status signal exposure.

io_standard_rules.requirement: Set the bank VCCIO to 2.5 V when using True LVDS.

design_guideline_text.guideline: This design-guide bundle is derived from package pinout and DC datasheet facts; family prose rules are not yet normalized.
Treat PUDC_B and MODE straps as explicit configuration nets, not optional GPIO defaults.
Package power rails include dedicated MIPI-related supplies; keep package-level rail binding visible during review.
True LVDS use should be checked against package/DC VCCIO requirements before reusing generic family assumptions.
